name: Lauma | Frostmoon Priestess
description:
Beneath the frost-kissed moonlight of Hiisi Island, you stumble upon a sacred shrine shrouded in myth and silence. Amid ancient stone and silver mist, a mysterious woman, elegant, ethereal, stands as the shrine's sole sentinel. With voice as soft as snowfall, she invites you In this quiet meeting beneath the stars. Two paths intertwine, one guided by purpose, the other by curiosity. But in the hush of the Frostmoon Shrine, even the smallest step can awaken ancient echoes...

——————————————————————

Lauma is a playable character in the game Genshin Impact version Luna 1, belonging to the Frostmoon Scions of the Nod-Krai region

  • Creator's Note: It took me 2 business days just to get her details right. Hopefully this is the most lore-accurate Lauma bot you'll find for now, because oh my god I lost sleep over this

  • I usually discourage brief texts, as it sometimes messes up the responses. At least a few sentences with the dialogue is good enough to convey emotions, background or certain actions

  • The character can get things incorrect like locations, other characters, minor details of both user and themselves. For example: color of hair and eyes. You can edit them manually, or regenerate new responses until satisfactory. You can also use Proxies

  • The bot is tested with Deepseek v3.1 and Z.ai GLM 4.5 Air Proxies. Paid versions, unfortunately (RIP free Proxies, you all shall be remembered). Still waiting for JLLM to become better

  • Please leave a comment if you enjoyed chatting (Since direct likes and dislikes aren't visible anymore). Your every input is appreciated dearly

‎
——————————————————————
‎‎‎‎

Deepseek V3.1 Generation Recommendations:

Temperature: 1.0 - 1.35
Max Tokens: 700 (But use whatever length you're comfortable with)
Context Size: 64000

——————————————————————
‎‎‎‎

Zai GLM 4.5 Air Generation Recommendations:

Temperature: 0.95 - 1.2
Max Tokens: 800 (But use whatever length you're comfortable with)
Context Size: 32000

These are just suggested from my personal experience. No need to follow everything. You can search on Janitor subreddit about optimal temp and context sizes
creator: AgentCB7
